spec.name: Mind Ward Ring
spec.summary: establishes mind energy in a ring perimeter with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that establishes mind energy in a ring perimeter with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: latched.
